title: Quest Alliance is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Quest Alliance is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quest Alliance family as a Subject Matter Expert in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quest Alliance:
Quest Alliance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance!
